title: Well-formed phased migration — additive + batched backfill + validator progression
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements the 5-phase MongoDB migration pattern: (1) additive index and field creation, (2) _id-range batched backfill with explicit write concern, (3) application dual-write, (4) validator progression from moderate to strict, (5) batched cleanup in separate release. Each phase is independently rollback-able.
